Metadata.CommitMsg:
build(deps): fix 3 npm advisories via overrides (form-data, esbuild, launch-editor)

Advisories published after the 2026-06-12 review (npm audit was clean then):
- form-data 4.0.5 -> 4.0.6 (HIGH, runtime, via axios): GHSA-hmw2-7cc7-3qxx CRLF injection
- esbuild 0.25.12 -> 0.28.1 (HIGH, dev/storybook): GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr (Deno-specific RCE; npm-only here)
- launch-editor 2.14.0 -> 2.14.1 (MED, dev/webpack-dev-server): GHSA-v6wh-96g9-6wx3 (Windows-only)

npm audit 0 vulns; lint + build + storybook smoke pass; lockfile public-registry clean.
Metadata.Author: antony <antony@foundation.sk>
